description: Single source of truth for ui-smoke specs that are deliberately NOT on the keyless PR path. The PR lane is directory-driven: it runs every test/ui-smoke/*.spec.ts EXCEPT the entries below, so any new spec is on the PR path by default and every exclusion is recorded here with a category and reason. Wiring is enforced by test/ui-smoke-coverage.test.ts; discovery is implemented by scripts/ui-smoke-pr-specs.mjs. Categories: live-only (genuinely cannot run keyless — needs real cloud credits, a model daemon, or a live stack and would fail/cost money), dedicated-tool (a long-running reporting/audit harness with its own package script and a broad/destructive walk), keyless-debt (fixture-capable, SHOULD run keyless but is not yet verified — a non-growing ratchet, see MAX_KEYLESS_DEBT).

specs.reason: Real cloud login + provisioning + chat against real Eliza Cloud; needs ELIZA_UI_SMOKE_CLOUD_LIVE=1 + ELIZA_UI_SMOKE_LIVE_STACK=1 + ELIZAOS_CLOUD_API_KEY and spends real cloud credits, so it must never run in a keyless PR lane — wired only into the nightly app-live-e2e.yml workflow.

Provider switching must hit the real app-core provider/runtime pipeline with ELIZA_UI_SMOKE_LIVE_STACK=1; the keyless route layer cannot restart the agent or re-derive the active provider and the spec self-skips without the live stack.

Routing config must persist through the real on-disk vault with ELIZA_UI_SMOKE_LIVE_STACK=1; the keyless stub returns a static routing config and does not persist PUTs, so the spec self-skips in PR smoke.

Wallet key add/reveal/delete must round-trip through the real vault-backed /api/secrets/inventory endpoints with ELIZA_UI_SMOKE_LIVE_STACK=1; the keyless stub exposes fixed inventory and the spec self-skips in PR smoke.

Drives real chat through a local llama.cpp model planner and requires a running llama-server (LLAMACPP_URL, usually with an eliza-1 GGUF loaded); the keyless PR lane cannot provide that model daemon or GPU/CPU budget, so it is a manual/live local-model report spec rather than a secret-free PR gate.

Runs via `bun run --cwd packages/app audit:app` (--project=audit-app); it walks every app view at desktop and mobile, captures artifacts, and writes manual-review stubs, so it is a deliberate visual-audit tool rather than default smoke (also testIgnore'd in the chromium project of playwright.ui-smoke.config.ts).

Generic per-control interaction harness (#8796); for every built-in view it fills inputs and clicks every control. Run on demand via `E2E_RECORD=1 bun run --cwd packages/app test:e2e test/ui-smoke/all-views-interaction.spec.ts`; it exercises destructive controls broadly so it is a coverage tool, not a narrow keyless PR gate.

Generic per-view rendered-geometry 44px tap-target + role/DOM coherence gate (#10722); it walks every built-in view and measures every standalone control, and the component-library defaults still render 32-40px controls, so the gate cannot pass keyless today. Run on demand via `bun run --cwd packages/app test:e2e test/ui-smoke/tap-target-geometry-all-views.spec.ts`; it is a coverage/audit tool, not a narrow keyless PR gate.
Drives Launcher view-catalog controls (#8796; renamed from springboard-interaction in #10001). Run on demand, not as a keyless PR gate.

Runs on demand via `ELIZA_SETTINGS_SPACING=1 node scripts/run-ui-playwright.mjs --config playwright.ui-smoke.config.ts test/ui-smoke/settings-spacing-audit.spec.ts`; it measures per-section safe-area/spacing and writes a JSON verdict plus notch-simulated screenshots to reports/settings-spacing, so it is a deliberate layout-audit harness (self-skips unless ELIZA_SETTINGS_SPACING=1).

Runs on demand via `ELIZA_SETTINGS_THEME=1 node scripts/run-ui-playwright.mjs --config playwright.ui-smoke.config.ts test/ui-smoke/settings-theme-audit.spec.ts`; it flips every settings section through light and dark themes and writes findings to reports/settings-theme, so it is a deliberate visual audit (self-skips unless ELIZA_SETTINGS_THEME=1).
Chat-view re-render / memory-stability harness (#9048) that cycles heap/DOM/listener growth. Run on demand via `bun run --cwd packages/app test:e2e test/ui-smoke/chat-view-memory-stability.spec.ts`.

Fixture-driven sensitive-request chat smoke; needs keyless wiring + verification after the lifeops decomposition refactor settles the new view-bearing plugins. Tracked debt — wire into keyless CI then remove this entry.

Desired two-client convergence contract, but the current keyless route layer creates per-page mocks with no shared message store, so the spec self-skips until a shared fixture backend or live shared agent/channel path is wired.

Desired cross-window preference sync contract, but the renderer does not yet ship the BroadcastChannel/useTabSync layer the spec asserts, so it self-skips until that feature lands and can run keyless.
